tasks.label: Configure Active Variant
tasks.command: VARIANT="${input:selectVariant}"; if [ "$VARIANT" = "OBC" ]; then PLATFORM="rp2350"; BUILD_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/build/obc"; elif [ "$VARIANT" = "HIL" ]; then PLATFORM="rp2350"; BUILD_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/build/hil"; fi; echo "Configuring $VARIANT for $PLATFORM in $BUILD_DIR..."; rm -f "$BUILD_DIR/CMakeCache.txt"; cmake -B "$BUILD_DIR" -S "${workspaceFolder}" -DPICO_PLATFORM=$PLATFORM -DBUILD_TARGET=$VARIANT
tasks.detail: Selects variant (OBC/HIL), sets the correct PICO_PLATFORM, and runs CMake configure.

tasks.label: Flash Configuration

linux.command: BUILD_DIR="${command:cmake.buildDirectory}"; echo "Using Build Dir: $BUILD_DIR"; VARIANT=$(grep "BUILD_TARGET:STRING" "$BUILD_DIR/CMakeCache.txt" | cut -d= -f2); echo "Target Variant: $VARIANT"; if [ "$VARIANT" = "OBC" ]; then UF2="phoenix-avionics.uf2"; BUS="8"; DEV="/dev/ttyOBC"; elif [ "$VARIANT" = "HIL" ]; then UF2="hil_node.uf2"; BUS="7"; DEV="/dev/ttyACM3"; else echo "Current variant is '$VARIANT'. Please select 'Main OBC' or 'HIL Node' from the CMake Variant selector (bottom bar) instead of 'ALL/Debug'."; exit 1; fi; echo "Flashing $UF2 to Bus $BUS..."; cmake --build "$BUILD_DIR" -j $(nproc) && find "$BUILD_DIR" -name "$UF2" -exec scp {} rock@100.115.224.114:~/firmware.uf2 \; && ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 "sudo fuser -k $DEV 2>/dev/null; echo 'Rebooting to Bootloader...'; sudo picotool reboot --bus $BUS -f -u; echo 'Waiting for USB...'; sleep 3; echo 'Flashing...'; sudo picotool load --bus $BUS -x ~/firmware.uf2"

tasks.detail: Builds and flashes the currently selected CMake Variant

tasks.label: Monitor Active Variant

linux.command: BUILD_DIR="${command:cmake.buildDirectory}"; VARIANT=$(grep "BUILD_TARGET:STRING" "$BUILD_DIR/CMakeCache.txt" | cut -d= -f2); if [ "$VARIANT" = "OBC" ]; then DEV="/dev/ttyOBC"; elif [ "$VARIANT" = "HIL" ]; then DEV="/dev/ttyHIL"; else echo "Invalid variant selected."; exit 1; fi; echo "Opening Monitor for $VARIANT on $DEV..."; ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 "sudo fuser -k $DEV 2>/dev/null; sudo rm -f /var/lock/LCK..*; sleep 1; sudo minicom -D $DEV -b 115200"

tasks.detail: Opens minicom for the currently selected CMake Variant

tasks.label: Flash and Monitor
tasks.detail: Build, Flash, and then Open Monitor

tasks.label: Reboot Pico
tasks.detail: Reboot any connected Pico (Warning: might reboot both)

tasks.label: Flash HIL Node
tasks.command: BUILD_DIR="/workspace/build/hil"; UF2="hil_node.uf2"; BUS="7"; DEV="/dev/ttyACM3"; echo "Flashing HIL Node..."; cmake --build "$BUILD_DIR" && find "$BUILD_DIR" -name "$UF2" -exec scp {} rock@100.115.224.114:~/firmware.uf2 \; && ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 "sudo fuser -k $DEV 2>/dev/null; echo 'Rebooting to Bootloader...'; sudo picotool reboot --bus $BUS -f -u; echo 'Waiting for USB...'; sleep 3; echo 'Flashing...'; sudo picotool load --bus $BUS -x ~/firmware.uf2"
tasks.detail: Explicitly builds and flashes the HIL Node

tasks.label: Flash OBC
tasks.command: BUILD_DIR="/workspace/build/obc"; UF2="phoenix-avionics.uf2"; BUS="8"; DEV="/dev/ttyOBC"; echo "Flashing OBC..."; cmake --build "$BUILD_DIR" && find "$BUILD_DIR" -name "$UF2" -exec scp {} rock@100.115.224.114:~/firmware.uf2 \; && ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 "sudo fuser -k $DEV 2>/dev/null; echo 'Rebooting to Bootloader...'; sudo picotool reboot --bus $BUS -f -u; echo 'Waiting for USB...'; sleep 3; echo 'Flashing...'; sudo picotool load --bus $BUS -x ~/firmware.uf2"
tasks.detail: Explicitly builds and flashes the Main OBC

tasks.label: Monitor HIL Node
tasks.command: DEV="/dev/ttyHIL"; echo "Opening Monitor for HIL on $DEV..."; ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 "sudo fuser -k $DEV 2>/dev/null; sudo rm -f /var/lock/LCK..*; sleep 1; sudo minicom -D $DEV -b 115200"
tasks.detail: Explicitly opens minicom for the HIL Node

tasks.label: Monitor OBC
tasks.command: DEV="/dev/ttyOBC"; echo "Opening Monitor for OBC on $DEV..."; ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 "sudo fuser -k $DEV 2>/dev/null; sudo rm -f /var/lock/LCK..*; sleep 1; sudo minicom -D $DEV -b 115200"
tasks.detail: Explicitly opens minicom for the Main OBC

tasks.label: Flash All
tasks.detail: Flashes both HIL Node and OBC

tasks.label: Deploy HIL Config
tasks.detail: Generates sensors.json configs and syncs python scripts to Rockchip

tasks.label: Start HIL Stream
tasks.detail: Runs the HIL streamer wrapper script.

tasks.label: Deploy & Stream
tasks.detail: Updates config, deploys to Rockchip, and immediately starts streaming
